title: Accounts Executive
description:
This role reports directly to the accountant.

Responsibilities

  • Full spectrum of Accounts Receivable functions
  • Responsible for Accounts Receivable collections and allocate payments received from customers
  • Prepare credit risk assessment of customers and maintaining credit limits
  • Prepare ageing analysis and provide for doubtful debts
  • Prepare invoices, credit notes for timely billings and ensure all supporting documents are complete
  • Accounting for deposits collection, bank-in, recording, refund and reconciliation.
  • Monitor and manage outstanding arrears and liaise with clients to chase for collections of arrears
  • Performs reconciliations and verifications on revenue, receipts and money collections including liaising with various department colleagues
  • Perform bank reconciliation for AR receipts and refunds
  • Performs month-end closing duties and ensure accuracy and meet timelines
  • Liaise with internal and external customers and maintain healthy and professional relationship with them
  • Must be prepared to cover cross function work within Finance Department, including job rotation within Finance Department for own exposure and learning purpose.
  • Manage and monitor accounts receivable ledger, ensuring timely collection of payments


Requirements

  • Polytechnic Diploma in Accounting or higher
  • At least 1 years of relevant working experience
  • Able to work independently under minimum supervision and comfortable with multi-tasking
  • Meticulous, good communication and interpersonal skills, and a good team player
  • Possess positive attitude, committed and self-motivated

postedCompany.description:
Established in 1993, Orchid Country Club is a premier Golf & Country Club in Singapore with a rich heritage and culture. We have since established ourselves as an industry leader in hospitality through our unique Orchid experience. The Club is also acclaimed as a Club where people from all walks of life can come together to enjoy golfing and utilise our sports & recreational facilities. If you are looking for a fun and refreshing Club experience here in Singapore, we’ve got something for each and every one of you.


Orchid Country Club is under the ownership of NTUC Club.
postedCompany.name: Orchid Country Club
